What We Do

Our Services

Transform Your Living Space

Home Remodeling

Breathe new life into your home with our expert remodeling services. From kitchen renovations and bathroom upgrades to full interior overhauls, we bring your vision to life with precision craftsmanship and premium materials.

  • ✓ Kitchen & bathroom remodels
  • ✓ Basement finishing & conversions
  • ✓ Room additions & expansions
  • ✓ Flooring, tile & cabinetry
  • ✓ Interior & exterior painting
  • ✓ Window & door replacement
No Job Too Small

Handyman Services

Got a honey-do list that keeps growing? Our skilled handymen are ready to tackle any repair or maintenance task around your home — quickly, affordably, and done right the first time.

  • ✓ Plumbing repairs & fixture installs
  • ✓ Electrical fixes & light installations
  • ✓ Drywall patching & painting touch-ups
  • ✓ Deck & fence repair
  • ✓ Appliance installation
  • ✓ General maintenance & inspections
Your Dream Home, Built From Scratch

New Home Building

Building a home is one of life's biggest milestones. At Precision Homes USA, we guide you through every step — from design consultation and permits to final walkthrough — ensuring your new home is everything you dreamed of and built to last generations.

  • ✓ Custom home design & blueprints
  • ✓ Full construction management
  • ✓ Foundation, framing & roofing
  • ✓ Electrical, plumbing & HVAC
  • ✓ Smart home & energy-efficient builds
  • ✓ Final inspections & warranty
